label: 第250話
source_locator: 単行本28巻 目次 p.91
summary_short: 乙骨の領域内には模倣した術式を宿す刀が無数に存在し、必中効果には天使の術式が設定される。乙骨とリカが宿儺を拘束し、虎杖は魂の境界を狙って伏黒を引き離そうとする。
summary_full: 乙骨の領域内には模倣した術式を宿す刀が無数に存在し、必中効果には天使の術式が設定される。乙骨とリカが宿儺を拘束し、虎杖は魂の境界を狙って伏黒を引き離そうとする。領域の刀には乙骨が模倣した術式が一つずつ宿り、本人も取るまで中身を知らない。乙骨・リカ・虎杖は術式の連打と魂への打撃で宿儺の腕と口を封じる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 乙骨憂太 takes responsibility for the failure of the 処刑人の剣 plan by igniting a new strategy centered around his 領域展開 ! With access to endless copied cursed techniques, the Queen of Curses , and 悠仁's soul-targeting punches by his side, 憂太 leads the way for the sorcerers to finally go on the offensive and bring down the King of Curses once and for all.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太's 領域展開 , 真贋相愛 allows him to imbue one of his copied cursed techniques into the domain's barrier as its sure-hit effect. The remaining cursed techniques are randomly stored within the katana scattered around his domain's environment. Only 憂太 can use the blades and the 術式 they contain is unknown until he grasps it. While the swords disappear after the technique is released once, the number of swords is unlimited. 憂太 unleashes his full arsenal of copied techniques on 宿儺. Using a sword containing ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla 's technique, 憂太 creates three miniature 式神 that resemble 里香 's head with bat wings. They circle 宿儺 and 虎杖悠仁 lands two punches on 宿儺, with the latter noting something unusual with the strikes. From above, 里香 punches down on 宿儺, forcing him to dodge it by stepping away. 宿儺 is subsequently slashed on the back as he passes through the 式神's paths from earlier, causing him to realize that 憂太 used a technique which places an inviolable barrier along their trajectories. As 宿儺 watches 憂太 hover in the air using 烏鷺亨子 's technique, he assesses his condition. Due to his battle with 五条悟 , 宿儺 is still unable to use his domain, and the effects of his 反転術式 are weakened. In addition, his 呪力 reserves are lowered to roughly the same as 憂太's, and having to constantly maintain 彌虚葛籠 prevents him from unleashing a world-cutting 解 . 憂太 running interference to give 悠仁 openings to strike 宿儺's soul. 里香 grabs 悠仁 and throws him at 宿儺 and 憂太 closes in at the same time. They launch a pincer attack and 宿儺 blocks 悠仁's kick but he notices the true nature behind 悠仁's strikes. By applying the same logic that allowed him to directly damage 真人 's soul, 悠仁 is perceiving and striking at the boundary between 宿儺 and 伏黒恵 's soul. This allows him to slowly awaken 恵's soul, which was submerged by the 浴 , and interrupt the physical connection between 宿儺 and 恵, thus decreasing 宿儺's 呪力 output and control over his body with each strike. The jujutsu sorcerers ' plan is to have 悠仁 weaken 宿儺 enough until he can't maintain 彌虚葛籠 , at which point 憂太 will use 邪去侮の梯子 to extinguish the 呪物 inside of 恵. 悠仁 wraps his legs around 宿儺's arms and the latter counters by grabbing his shirt and attempts to activate 捌 . However, 憂太 uses 呪言 and orders 宿儺 to not move, rescuing 悠仁 for a direct hit. 憂太 takes advantage of 宿儺's immobility and strikes him with 宇守羅彈 using another katana, blasting the King of Curses into a pillar. 宿儺 regains his footing on the pillar, only for 里香 to rush in with a hammering smash attack. As 悠仁 and 憂太 rush after 宿儺 to continue the assault, 宿儺 uses the brief respite to launch 解 at them, dealing heavy slashes to the two sorcerers. With the two sorcerers driven back, 里香 battles 宿儺 alone, only for him to grab her fist and cut it apart with 捌. 悠仁 and 憂太 withstanding 宿儺's weakened slashes. 宿儺 notes that while the two are not as durable as 石流龍 , killing them with slashes is impossible without using 捌 . Additionally, while his 呪力 output is lowered from his fight with 悟, 宿儺 finds it strange that all the sorcerers from 呪術高専 who appeared to fight him had high-level defenses. 悠仁 was able to learn 反転術式 in a month, and 憂太 was able to narrow the target of his 領域展開's sure-hit effects to only him, which requires a highly advanced barrier technique . Amused, 宿儺 asks 悠仁 and 憂太 what they did in the past month. The two boys respond with conflicting answers. 悠仁 says that they achieved their power through hard work and grit, while 憂太 claims that they cheated. Both 悠仁 and 憂太 realize the highly dangerous situation they are, but resume their attacks nonetheless. As 里香 and 悠仁 occupy 宿儺's arms, 憂太 draws blood with his katana before attaching a manga panel to 宿儺's chest using the effect of シャルル ベルナール 's G戦杖 . Having fulfilled the conditions for ink, 憂太 sees 宿儺's future movements and dodges his attacks before landing a heavy blow to his head, with 宿儺 noticing the technique's precognitive effects. 宿儺 is bitten by his own fangs! As 里香 and 悠仁 continue the assault, 宿儺 lists out the five cursed techniques he's seen 憂太 use, and considers the possibility that he copied 無下限呪術 . He quickly dismisses the notion, as the 六眼 is required to control 無下限呪術, and wonders if 憂太 has no more techniques. At the same time, 憂太 realizes that 宿儺 leaves an opening whenever he's hit by a new technique for the first time. Picking up a katana, 憂太 uses 烏鷺's technique to block 宿儺's view of himself before thrusting the sword through the distorted space at him. 宿儺 catches the katana, only for 憂太 reveal that the 術式 within it was 捌 as he activates it. Slashes cut into the King of Curses' hand and across his surprised face as he realizes that he's being hit by his own technique.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 乙骨憂太 宿儺 虎杖悠仁 里香 五条悟 (言及のみ) 伏黒恵 (言及のみ) 天使 (言及のみ) 石流龍 (回想) シャルル ベルナール
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 宿儺の術式 彌虚葛籠／反転術式 術式 御廚子 捌／解 捌／解 乙骨憂太の術式 模倣／呪言／G戦杖／式神 (ドゥルヴ's 術式)* 御廚子 捌 Sky Manipulation* 宇守羅彈 領域展開：真贋相愛／反転術式 術式 里香 呪言／G戦杖／式神 (ドゥルヴ's 術式)* 御廚子 捌 Sky Manipulation* 宇守羅彈 捌 宇守羅彈 虎杖悠仁の術式 反転術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase11: 乙骨の領域内には模倣した術式を宿す刀が無数に存在し、必中効果には天使の術式が設定される。
乙骨とリカが宿儺を拘束し、虎杖は魂の境界を狙って伏黒を引き離そうとする。
領域の刀には乙骨が模倣した術式が一つずつ宿り、本人も取るまで中身を知らない。
乙骨・リカ・虎杖は術式の連打と魂への打撃で宿儺の腕と口を封じる。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
